title: Energinet Energi Data Service — Danish energy system
description: Free and open data on the Danish energy system from Energinet (Danish TSO): electricity-market data, consumption and production, CO2 emission signals and more. Includes measured and forecast series, many updated frequently. Directly relevant to the Nordic synchronous area (DK1/DK2). EDiT links only; Energinet hosts the data.

distribution.note: Free, open REST API with NO registration or key required. Licensed CC BY 4.0 (attribute as 'Source: Energinet (www.energidataservice.dk)'). Differentiated, dataset-specific rate limits apply (HTTP 429 if exceeded) -- request roughly once per a dataset's update frequency rather than polling continuously. Example: https://api.energidataservice.dk/dataset/CO2Emis?start=now-PT15M . Swagger docs and per-dataset metadata on the portal.

loader.snippet: import pandas as pd, requests; r = requests.get('https://api.energidataservice.dk/dataset/CO2Emis', params={'start':'now-PT15M'}); df = pd.DataFrame(r.json()['records'])

variables: Many individual datasets (e.g. CO2Emis, Production, Consumption, electricity-market series), each with its own fields documented on its dataset page; typically timestamped hourly or finer, values in their stated units. Full dataset list and field definitions maintained upstream by Energinet.
